Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: no selective disclosure under Reg FD
On 2025-03-15, Controller approved export of pseudonymized uptime telemetry to Processor’s EU facility using the 2021 SCCs with supplemental encryption
GLBA opt-out notice is provided annually

must_detect.matched_text:
Scope: Processor Pinnacle Data Works LLC provides analytics tooling for employee training and investor-relations sites; no direct marketing; no sale or sharing under CCPA.
Categories of data: hashed customer IDs (e.g., HB-000-AX9), de-identified patient event metrics, GLBA customer service notes with redactions; no Social Security numbers, no live PHI transmission to Processor.
MNPI controls: analyst portals contain only public, already-announced information; no selective disclosure under Reg FD; training uses synthetic securities examples (Ticker: MGB:NC-HB is a non-tradable placeholder).
Retention: Processor stores logs for 18 months, then auto-deletes via retention policy; Controller retains investor FAQ submissions for 12 months in minimized fields.
Cross-border transfer approval: On 2025-03-15, Controller approved export of pseudonymized uptime telemetry to Processor’s EU facility using the 2021 SCCs with supplemental encryption.
Consent withdrawal handling: employee and consumer choices are recorded in a do-not-process flag; no adverse action is taken on withdrawal, and services remain available where lawful.
DSAR workflow: On 2025-04-02, a household access and erasure request was fulfilled; decommissioned records were removed from active systems and from backups via the standard purge window.
Security and minimization: only role-based access; fields marked “optional” are suppressed; data dictionaries prevent collection of free text that could include MNPI or health details.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
